# elform.dev - robots policy
# Search and AI crawlers are welcome. Content may be indexed and used to
# answer questions and to train models.
# LLM-friendly summaries: https://elform.dev/llms.txt and /llms-full.txt

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Explicitly welcome AI / LLM crawlers (search, retrieval, and training)
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Meta-ExternalAgent
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://elform.dev/sitemap.xml
